title: Fix overlay rotation in portrait mode
description: When the LifeTracker page is rendered in portrait orientation, the player-card grid is rotated 90° via RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) but the full-screen overlay (Counters/Actions/Commander Damage) is not, leaving it misaligned with the rotated player cards. Wrap the overlay in the same RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) when isPortrait so it follows the player layout's coordinate space.
close_reason: Wrapped _buildActiveOverlay() in RotatedBox(quarterTurns: 1) when isPortrait in life_tracker_page.dart, so the overlay shares the same logical coordinate space as the rotated player layout. flutter analyze --no-pub clean.

title: Skip eliminated players' turns + long-press elimination
description: When a player is eliminated, the turn tracker still highlights them. Skip eliminated players in _nextTurn(), record skipped TurnLogEntry per skipped player, remove self-eliminate icon button, replace with long-press on life total + confirm dialog. Filter skipped entries from GameStatsUtility. See plan: ~/.claude/plans/when-a-player-is-piped-frog.md
close_reason: Implemented: TurnLogEntry.skipped field, _nextTurn skips eliminated players (bounded loop), _previousTurn auto-pops skipped entries, long-press life total + confirm dialog replaces self-eliminate icon, _hasDismissedElimination removed, GameStatsUtility filters skipped entries. flutter analyze clean.

title: Fix partner background image sizing in PlayerCard
description: In lib/player_card.dart partner backgrounds use Row(Expanded(Image.network(fit: BoxFit.cover))) which only constrains width via Expanded; the image keeps its intrinsic aspect ratio and leaves vertical empty space in each half. Fix by mirroring the CommanderDamageOverlay pattern: wrap each per-commander image in ClipRect(Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [Opacity(Image(fit: BoxFit.cover))])) so it fills both dimensions of its Expanded slot.
close_reason: Mirrored the CommanderDamageOverlay tile pattern in PlayerCard: each per-commander background image is now wrapped in ClipRect(Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [Opacity(Image(fit: BoxFit.cover))])) inside its Expanded Row slot. Forces the image to fill both width AND height of its half (previously only width was constrained, leaving vertical empty space for partner backgrounds).

title: Overlay refinements: enable receiver own slot, restyle counter overlay
description: Round 2 follow-ups to the full-screen overlay rework. (1) Receiver's own commander slot in the cmdr dmg overlay must be tappable so stolen-commander damage can be recorded; replace the dim/disable with a small (you) badge. (2) Counter and Action overlays look tiny at full screen; rework CounterOverlay to a fixed 2x2 grid that fills the viewport and restyle to match the life-counter visual language (large white shadowed value, dark circular icon buttons). See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented round-2 overlay refinements. (1) Receiver's own slot in CommanderDamageOverlay is now fully tappable with a small (you) badge top-left, so stolen-commander damage can be recorded. (2) CounterOverlay reworked to a 2x2 grid that fills the viewport (no scrolling for the 4-item case) with life-counter visual language: titleMedium label, displaySmall white shadowed value, 36px dark circular icon buttons. Fallback GridView path retained for non-4-item callers. flutter analyze: no issues.

title: Rework overlays to full-screen with unique commander damage layout
description: Counter and Action overlays become full-screen (rotated for top-row players). Commander Damage overlay becomes a unique full-screen view mirroring the life tracker layout, where each opposing player slot shows damage that commander dealt to the receiver. Partners split slots horizontally. See plan at C:\Users\ryan9\.claude\plans\testing-of-the-app-jiggly-papert.md
close_reason: Implemented full-screen overlay rework: Counter and Action overlays now fill viewport (rotated 180 for top-row players); new CommanderDamageOverlay mirrors life tracker layout per receiver, splitting partner commanders horizontally. flutter analyze: no issues.
